html:
Exclusive to:

“Gathers loot nearby, and after swimming in the Ocean for a bit will shed Salt Crystals.”

-Salt Dog

Salty Dog's Hat can be crafted at the Combriner. When the hat is equipped, a Salt Dog appears. It can be repaired with a Sewing Kit or Trusty Tape to restore its durability.

Contents

  • 1 Salt Dog
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Gallery

Salt Dog

Salt Dog is a mob that appears when a player equips the Salty Dog's Hat. Once summoned, Salt Dog follows the player, running on land or swimming in the Ocean to collect items within a 3.75 tile radius and deliver them directly to the player’s inventory. Among valid items within range, it prioritizes those farthest from the player. Salt Dog cannot pick up certain items, similar to The Lazy Forager, such as items from traps or living mobs.

When swimming in the Ocean for a minute, Salt Dog will accumulate Salt Crystals on its back. Once it reaches land, it will shake off 1–2 Salt Crystals.

Salt Dog can be attacked and killed by hostile creatures such as Hounds. If killed, Salt Dog will respawn after one full day. If Salt Dog is dismissed by unequipping the hat, it will return later with the same health it had before being dismissed.

Trivia

  • The Salty Dog's Hat was added in the Winter's Feast 2025 update.

Assets

  • Salty Dog's Hat Equipped
  • Salty Dog's Hat Dead Equipped

Gallery

  • Salty Dog concept art from Rhymes with Play stream.

Exclusive to:
“It only comes with a friend-ship.”
–Wilson
“Is that real fur?”
–Willow
“Wolfgang make great captain!”
–Wolfgang
“It is my turn to play the captain.”
–Wendy
“WEARABLE COMMAND MODULE”
–WX-78
“It gives one quite a commanding appearance.”
–Wickerbottom
“At least it doesn't attract birds.”
–Woodie
“It conveys an air of authority. I think it suits me.”
–Maxwell
“The helm öf öne whö hölds cömmand över the seas.”
–Wigfrid
“Wendy said it's her turn to play the captain.”
–Webber
“It makes me look quite distinguished, non?”
–Warly
“Salty head thing!”
–Wormwood
“Wonder what critter that tail belonged to.”
–Winona
“A hat needs fur, I do concur.”
–Wortox
“Soft fur like sea doggie!”
–Wurt
“It looks so official!”
–Walter
“The fur trim is quite fetching.”
–Wanda
“Gathers loot nearby, and after swimming in the Ocean for a bit will shed Salt Crystals.”
-Salt Dog

“Who's a proud little seal pup?”
–Wilson
“Alright fine, you're kinda cute.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang love salty little guy!”
–Wolfgang
“You are no hound... but I'll overlook it.”
–Wendy
“SALT RETRIEVAL UNIT, DESIGNATION: RUSTY”
–WX-78
“I'm more of a cat person.”
–Wickerbottom
“Hey buddy!”
–Woodie
“Don't you DARE shake seawater all over my suit!”
–Maxwell
“Tö me, my briny ally!”
–Wigfrid
“You're a weird dog, but we like you!”
–Webber
“Merci beacoup for the salt, mon ami!”
–Warly
“Sea Woofer!”
–Wormwood
“Hey there salty fella!”
–Winona
“I find no fault in your love for salt!”
–Wortox
“Get salt, sea doggie!”
–Wurt
“He's not technically a dog, but he's still a good boy!”
–Walter
“I always did have a soft spot for crusty little dogs.”
–Wanda

'''Salt Dog''' is a mob that appears when a player equips the '''Salty Dog's Hat'''. Once summoned, Salt Dog follows the player, running on land or swimming in the Ocean to collect items within a 3.75 tile radius and deliver them directly to the player’s inventory. Among valid items within range, it prioritizes those farthest from the player. Salt Dog cannot pick up certain items, similar to [[The Lazy Forager/DST|The Lazy Forager]], such as items from traps or living mobs.

When swimming in the Ocean for a minute, Salt Dog will accumulate [[Salt Crystals]] on its back. Once it reaches land, it will shake off 1–2 Salt Crystals.

Salt Dog can be attacked and killed by hostile creatures such as [[Hound]]s. If killed, Salt Dog will respawn after one full day. If Salt Dog is dismissed by unequipping the hat, it will return later with the same health it had before being dismissed.
{{clear}}
